column1: # price-table.tsv — consumer config for bin/stage-economics.sh (drift-kit/SPEC.md §The stage-economics meter).
# Copy this beside your gates dir (default scripts/price-table.tsv, DRIFT_KIT_PRICE_TABLE) and
# replace the placeholder rows with YOUR model roster. The per-token prices are public facts, but
# the roster of models you run is yours — a kit literal enumerating it would publish it (the
# provenance seam / graph-vocab pattern), so this template ships the schema and placeholders only.
# Tab-separated. One row per model id (the id as it appears in the transcript's message.model).
# Columns are USD per single token (a $/MTok price ÷ 1,000,000). A model with no row here
# degrades its cost cell to n/a — token counts still report; pricing is advisory, never required.
